verified_papers.title: Semantic Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping: A Survey on State of the Art, Challenges, and Future Directions
verified_papers.reason: The title directly addresses 'Semantic Visual SLAM' and 'semantic mapping', which are core to the topic. It is a survey covering the state of the art, challenges, and future directions, making it highly relevant to the research on semantic maps in visual SLAM.

verified_papers.title: Evaluating the Impact of Semantic Segmentation and Pose Estimation on Dense Semantic SLAM
verified_papers.reason: The title includes 'Semantic Segmentation' and 'SLAM', which are directly related to the topic. It also mentions 'semantic mapping' implicitly through 'Dense Semantic SLAM'. The paper evaluates the impact of key components in semantic SLAM, which is directly relevant to the research on semantic maps in visual SLAM.

verified_papers.title: Kimera: an Open-Source Library for Real-Time Metric-Semantic Localization and Mapping
verified_papers.reason: The title mentions 'Kimera', which is a baseline term in the topic. It also includes 'Semantic' and 'SLAM', directly relating to the topic. The paper discusses an open-source library for real-time metric-semantic localization and mapping, which is a baseline system for semantic SLAM research.

verified_papers.title: Real-Time Monocular Object-Model Aware Sparse SLAM
verified_papers.reason: The title includes 'Real-Time' and 'Monocular SLAM', which are related to visual SLAM. The snippet mentions 'deep-learned object detector' and 'CNN-based', indicating the use of deep learning. It also mentions enriching maps semantically, which is related to semantic mapping. Thus, it is directly related to the topic.

verified_papers.title: SoCubeSLAM: Semantic Object CubeSLAM for Monocular Visual SLAM
verified_papers.reason: The title includes 'Semantic', 'Object', and 'Monocular Visual SLAM', which are directly related to the topic. The snippet mentions using deep-learned indoor object detectors, indicating the use of deep learning for semantic mapping in monocular SLAM. It is a specific approach (CubeSLAM) for semantic mapping, making it a relevant baseline.
